commands.review_summary:
The PR adds `ollama/gemma3:4b` to the small live model matrix and updates the agent live-test harness, tests, and live-testing docs for Ollama discovery and base URL handling.

PR surface: Source +1, Tests +400, Docs +1. Total +402 across 4 files.

Reproducibility: not applicable. this is a test-harness expansion, not a bug report. Current-main source inspection does confirm the requested Ollama model is absent from the small matrix.
commands.review_followup: - The protected maintainer-labeled PR should remain in normal maintainer review; there is no narrow automated repair to queue.

target.title: test(agents): include Ollama in small live model matrix
target.body:
## Summary
- Add `ollama/gemma3:4b` to the curated small live model matrix.
- Hydrate Ollama live-provider settings from `OPENCLAW_LIVE_OLLAMA_BASE_URL`, existing config, or the local default endpoint.
- Document the Ollama small-model live-test default endpoint and override env.

Refs #86599.

## Verification
- `node scripts/docs-list.js`
- `git diff --check origin/main...HEAD`
- `node_modules/.bin/oxfmt --check src/agents/live-model-filter.ts src/agents/model-compat.test.ts src/agents/models.profiles.live.test.ts`
- `OPENCLAW_VITEST_MAX_WORKERS=1 node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run src/agents/model-compat.test.ts src/agents/models.profiles.live.test.ts --reporter=dot` (114 tests passed after rebase onto `9596b7bd`)
- AWS Crabbox `check:changed`: provider `aws`, lease `cbx_9168dabc619c`, run `run_98d36069ed15`, exit 0 on base `00c9f811`
- Earlier AWS Crabbox live Ollama proof: lease `cbx_828aa916347a`, run `run_e446926f9a59`

## Real behavior proof
Behavior addressed: the small live model matrix now includes a real Ollama local-model route and can discover/configure Ollama without requiring manual model config.
Real environment tested: focused local Vitest wrapper in a Codex worktree; AWS Crabbox Linux changed gate; earlier AWS Crabbox live Ollama run.
Exact steps or command run after this patch: `node scripts/crabbox-wrapper.mjs run --timing-json --idle-timeout 60m --ttl 120m --shell -- "pnpm check:changed"`
Evidence after fix: `run_98d36069ed15` completed with exit 0 on provider `aws`, lease `cbx_9168dabc619c`; a clean rebase onto `9596b7bd` then passed diff/format and the 114-test focused suite.
Observed result after fix: core/coreTests/docs changed lanes passed, including typecheck, lint, docs lane, guards, and import-cycle checks.
What was not tested: a live Ollama rerun after the final rebase; the live Ollama proof was collected earlier on the same branch lineage.
target.author: vincentkoc
